app_settings.description: A set of key-value pairs for configuring app-specific settings.

client_affinity_enabled.description: Indicates if client affinity is enabled, which routes requests from the same client to the same server instance.

client_certificate_enabled.description: Determines if client certificates are required for authentication.

client_certificate_exclusion_paths.description: Specifies paths that are excluded from client certificate authentication requirements.

client_certificate_mode.description: Defines the mode of client certificate usage, such as optional or required.

enabled.description: Specifies whether the web app is currently enabled or not.

ftp_publish_basic_authentication_enabled.description: Indicates if basic authentication is enabled for FTP publishing.

https_only.description: Forces the web app to be accessible only via HTTPS, enhancing security.

name.description: The unique name of the web app.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Determines if the web app is accessible over the public network.

service_plan_id.description: The ID of the service plan to which the web app is associated.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the web app for organizational purposes.

virtual_network_subnet_id.description: The ID of the virtual network subnet where the web app is placed.

webdeploy_publish_basic_authentication_e.description: Specifies if basic authentication is enabled for Web Deploy publishing.

connection_string.description: Connection string for the web app.
connection_string.type: list(object({name: string, type: string, value: string}))

site_config.description: A set of configuration options for the web app.
site_config.type: list(object({always_on: bool, api_definition_url: string, api_management_api_id: string, app_command_line: string, application_stack: list(object({docker_image_name: string, docker_registry_url: string, docker_registry_username: string, docker_registry_password: string, dotnet_version: string, go_version: string, java_server: string, java_server_version: string, java_version: string, node_version: string, php_version: string, python_version: string, ruby_version: string})), default_documents:list(string), ftps_state: string, health_check_path: string, health_check_eviction_time_in_min: number, http2_enabled: bool, ip_restriction: list(object({action: string, ip_address: string, name: string, priority: number, service_tag: string, virtual_network_subnet_id: string})), ip_restriction_default_action: string, load_balancing_mode: string, local_mysql_enabled: bool, managed_pipeline_mode: string, minimum_tls_version: string, remote_debugging_enabled: bool, remote_debugging_version: string, use_32_bit_worker: bool, vnet_route_all_enabled: bool, websockets_enabled: bool, worker_count: number}))

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
